PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

  ?film wdt:P1046 wd:Q462 .

  ?film wdt:P577 ?releaseDate .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?film rdfs:label ?titleLabel

}
ORDER BY ASC(?releaseDate)

OFFSET 3
